items.name: Basic List
items.desc: Interactive control panel — item count, sizing strategies, overscan, scroll-to, data operations

items.name: Photo Album
items.desc: Responsive image gallery — toggle between grid and masonry layouts

items.name: Messaging
items.desc: Chat UI — reverse mode, date headers, auto-scroll, incoming messages

items.name: Contact List
items.desc: A–Z grouped contacts with sticky headers and selection

items.name: Data Table
items.desc: Resizable columns, sortable headers, and row selection — 10K rows at 120 FPS

items.name: Social Feed
items.desc: Social feed with real posts — variable heights measured automatically

items.name: Carousel
items.desc: MD3-aligned photo carousel — infinite loop with snap, variant layouts, and real photos

items.name: Window Scroll
items.desc: Document-level scrolling with async data loading — no inner scrollbar

items.name: Track List
items.desc: Music library with async loading — toggle between list, grid, and table views

items.name: Accessibility
items.desc: WAI-ARIA listbox — role, aria-setsize, aria-posinset, and aria-activedescendant updating live in the inspector

items.name: Velocity Loading
items.desc: Smart async loading — skips fetches when scrolling fast, preloads in scroll direction

items.name: Code Explorer
items.desc: Browse vlist's own source — file tree, per-file symbols & history with search

items.name: Large Dataset
items.desc: 100K–5M items via the bounded logical scroll model

items.name: Bounded Scroll
items.desc: 1M items without compression via the bounded logical scroll model (RFC-012)

items.name: Variable Sizes
items.desc: Per-item height functions and auto-measured DOM sizing

items.name: Scroll Restore
items.desc: Save and restore scroll position across navigations

items.name: Scrollbar
items.desc: Native, custom, and none — configure auto-hide, gutter, hover behavior, and track width

items.name: Sortable
items.desc: Drag-and-drop reordering with handle or full-item drag — task list demo

items.name: Tree View
items.desc: Collapsible file tree — expand/collapse, keyboard navigation, type-ahead search

items.name: File Browser
items.desc: Finder-like file browser with resizable/sortable table list view and grid toggle

items.name: Plugin Wizard
items.desc: Discover all 17 vlist plugins — infinite carousel with code snippets
